description: The Fruit Town Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods alliance, formed in the 1970s in Compton, California. Named after fruit-named streets in their neighborhood, the gang is primarily African-American and known for its rivalry with the Mob Piru Bloods. It has been involved in violent feuds and has affiliations with rappers such as Chris Brown and Soulja Boy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: East side of Compton but active in Fort Worth , Houston , St. Louis , Newark , Norfolk, Virginia , Portsmouth, Virginia , and Birmingham
country_links.context: The Fruit Town Piru is active in multiple U.S. cities including Fort Worth, Houston, St. Louis, Newark, Norfolk, Portsmouth, and Birmingham.
